# Punk Records Inference

> KV-state persistence for vLLM. Capture attention + hybrid recurrent state after each agent turn, store on disk (.nls), re-inject on the next request so the model skips re-prefilling full history.

## Canonical docs (this repo)

- [Documentation map](docs/PLATFORM.md): **Main entry** — architecture, journey, benchmarks, economics
- [Overview](docs/OVERVIEW.md): Problem, proof, key discoveries
- [NLS pipeline](docs/NLS_PIPELINE.md): Full five-phase architecture
- [Journey](docs/JOURNEY.md): LoRA → MoE → KV research arc
- [PRI runtime](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): vLLM plugin, `pri/` layout
- [Benchmarks](docs/BENCHMARKS.md): April production + June reproducible proof
- [Economics](docs/ECONOMICS.md): Compute, token, energy, storage savings (June 2026 bench)
- [Model matrix](docs/MODEL_MATRIX.md): Tier B plug-and-play
- [Installation](docs/getting-started/installation.md) · [Quickstart](docs/getting-started/quickstart.md)
- [Client contract](docs/CLIENT_CONTRACT.md) · [Limitations](docs/LIMITATIONS.md) · [Licensing](docs/LICENSING.md)

## Proof artifacts

- [Overnight run](bench/results/overnight_20260624_003614/): frozen JSON + [research analytics](bench/results/overnight_20260624_003614/research/README.md)
- [Live demo](https://punkrecords.live): conversational + API transparency log

## Legacy mirror

[neural-ledger-system](https://github.com/umbecanessa/neural-ledger-system) redirects here — docs are maintained in this repository.

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/umbecanessa/punk-records-inference.git
cd punk-records-inference
export MODEL_PATH=/path/to/your/checkpoint
docker compose -f docker/compose.yaml up --build
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/models
```

Unit tests (no GPU): `pip install pytest torch zstandard requests && pytest tests/ -q`

## Key subsystems

- Capture: WRITE turn state → .nls (`NLS_CHAIN_CAPTURE_MODE=turn`)
- Resume: READ prior turn KV (`memory_inject_mode=resume`, turn ≥ 2)
- Swiss: semantic retrieval (opt-in)
- Overflow: resume + Swiss when trim evicts tokens (opt-in)

Patent: U.S. Provisional 64/050,345
